text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, August 03. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Automations are great when they work. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan's team played a match and won 1-0! It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: That's a big step. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that having dinner with our friends tonight. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Neighborhood connections are fun. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. That is a clean implementation. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Yum, that sounds delicious! How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. I can help troubleshoot that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the schedule covered. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Neighborhood connections are fun. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Reading scientific papers late tonight. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Meal planning saves so much time. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Toddlers are full of energy. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
